sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	程昱 (仲德)


	 Simplified Chinese 
	程昱 (仲德)


	 Pronunciation 
	Cheng2 Yu4 (Zhong4de2)


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Chéng Yù (Zhòngdé)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Ch‘êng Yü (Chung-tê)

	 Birthplace 
	Dong’er, Dong County (Presently Yanggu County in Shandong Province)

	 Other Names 
	Cheng Li

	 Name Notes 
	Cheng (程) Li (立) was his original name, he dreamed about the mount Tai Shan when he was young, holding the sun (日) with both hands. Hence Cao Cao changed his name to Yu (昱) [Cheng Yu]. As you can see the word of Yu is composed with the word ‘sun’ (日) and the word ‘stand’ Li (立), together they form the word of Yu (昱).

full_text:
Cheng Yu (Zhongde) 程昱 (仲德)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Yu (程昱), styledZhongde (仲德), was born in Dong’er, Dong County (Presently Yanggu County in Shandong Province). Served Wei as an advisor. From Dong’e in Dongjun. Cheng Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cheng Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
